projectDescription: A dark Gruvbox-inspired Visual Studio Code color theme built by CodelyTV, designed for productivity with carefully tuned syntax highlighting across Python, JavaScript, CSS, HTML, JSON, Markdown, SQL, and more.
keyFeatures: Dark Gruvbox-inspired color palette optimized for readability
Comprehensive syntax highlighting for Python, JavaScript, CSS, HTML, JSON, Markdown, and SQL
Carefully tuned UI colors for Activity Bar, Status Bar, Sidebar, Tabs, and Panels
Italic font styles for comments, parameters, and keywords
Distinctive cursor and selection highlight colors for improved focus
Debug console and gutter colors for efficient debugging workflows
